message:
refactor(agents): robust marker-block parsing, project-scoped search, and full JSON mode for mutating actions

agents.rs — marker block handling:
- Replace naive `content.contains(start_marker)` checks in `contains_blurb`
  and `contains_legacy_blurb` with `contains_marker_block()`, which requires
  both the start AND end marker to be present before declaring a blurb exists.
- Extract `find_marker_block_range()` to locate the first well-formed
  start/end marker pair, skipping orphaned start markers that appear
  earlier in the file (e.g. when users paste example markers in docs).
- Extract `remove_marker_block()` which trims surrounding whitespace
  cleanly, replacing duplicated whitespace-trimming logic that was
  previously inlined in both `remove_blurb` and `remove_legacy_blurb`.
- `get_blurb_version` now scopes its regex search to the located marker
  block range instead of the entire file content.
- `append_blurb` on empty content now returns the blurb directly without
  a leading blank line.

agents.rs — project-scoped file search:
- Add `find_agent_search_root()` which walks upward to the nearest
  project boundary (.git, .beads, _beads dir) to define a search ceiling.
- Add `detect_agent_file_in_project()` that replaces the fixed-depth
  `detect_agent_file_in_parents(&work_dir, 3)` call. The search is
  bounded by the project root instead of an arbitrary level count,
  preventing capture of unrelated agent files above the workspace.
- `detect_agent_file_in_parents` loop refactored from `for` to explicit
  `loop` with manual level counter to fix an off-by-one edge case where
  the counter would advance past the limit before checking the last dir.
- `search_scope_description()` and `agent_file_not_found_reason()` give
  contextual error/status messages that include both the working dir and
  the discovered project root.

agents.rs — JSON mode for mutating actions:
- All mutating actions (add, remove, update) now emit structured JSON
  output with action, performed, file_path, backup_path, bytes_written,
  version fields when running in JSON output mode.
- Dry-run variants also emit JSON with dry_run: true and would_action.
- No-op results (already_current, nothing_to_remove, already_up_to_date)
  emit JSON with performed: false and a reason field.
- New `require_force_for_json_action()` gate: mutating actions in JSON
  mode now require --force (since interactive confirmation prompts are
  not possible), returning a Validation error if omitted.

agents.rs — general cleanup:
- Extract `backup_agent_file()`, `add_confirmation_message()`,
  `confirm_add_operation()`, and `validate_action_selection()` helpers
  to reduce duplication and function length.
- `validate_action_selection()` provides a runtime check that at most
  one of --add/--remove/--update/--check is selected (complementing the
  clap-level conflicts_with_all annotations).

cli/mod.rs — clap conflict annotations:
- Add `conflicts_with_all` to all four agent action flags (--add,
  --remove, --update, --check) so clap rejects conflicting combinations
  at parse time with a proper error message.
- New test `test_agents_add_conflicts_with_check` verifies the conflict.

history.rs — restore next-step improvements:
- Extract `is_external_jsonl_target()` and `is_default_jsonl_target()`
  from inline logic in `current_jsonl_path_for_backup_with_cwd`.
- New `restore_next_step()` builds a context-aware follow-up command:
  sets BEADS_JSONL env var when the target is not the default
  issues.jsonl, and appends --allow-external-jsonl for external targets.
- New `shell_quote()` utility for POSIX-safe single-quote escaping.
- Add `RESTORE_NOTE_DB_UNCHANGED` and `RESTORE_NOTE_TOMBSTONE_PROTECTION`
  constants; `emit_restore_output` now includes these as notes in JSON,
  toon, rich, and plain output modes.

tests:
- agents.rs: 14 new unit tests covering marker-block edge cases
  (incomplete markers, orphaned start markers before valid blocks),
  project-scoped detection, JSON-mode add/remove/update (force
  requirement, dry-run passthrough), search scope descriptions,
  confirmation messages, and conflicting action rejection.
- history.rs: 4 new unit tests for restore_next_step (default target,
  custom internal target, external target with flag, shell quoting).
- e2e_history_restore_prune.rs: extended e2e_history_restore_json_output
  test to assert the new `notes` array in JSON restore output.

Cargo.lock:
- Dependency updates: arc-swap 1.8.2→1.9.0, itoa 1.0.17→1.0.18,
  pulldown-cmark 0.13.1→0.13.3, rustls-webpki 0.103.9→0.103.10,
  tar 0.4.44→0.4.45, tru 0.2.1→0.2.2, zerocopy 0.8.42→0.8.47,
  windows-sys 0.60.2→0.61.2.
- asupersync 0.2.7 removed (duplicate); 0.2.9 now sourced from
  crates.io registry. franken-decision/evidence/kernel 0.2.7 entries
  removed, 0.2.9 entries now sourced from registry.
- fastmcp-rust git dep updated to commit 53eb822d.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
